de: Lawine von Bewerbungen nach den Noten beim National Assessment. Jeder fünfte Kandidat wollte seine Arbeit sehen. Kandidaten für die nationale Bewertung, die mit den am Dienstag, dem 30. Juni, einen Tag früher als geplant, veröffentlichten Noten unzufrieden waren, hatten die Möglichkeit, eine Einsichtnahme in ihre Arbeiten zu beantragen. In einem Zentrum in Slatina reichte jeder fünfte Kandidat ein Ass ein...
title: Avalanșă de cereri după notele la Evaluarea Națională. Un candidat din cinci a cerut să-și vadă lucrarea
description: Candidații de la Evaluarea Națională pe care notele afișate marți, 30 iunie, cu o zi mai devreme decât era programat, i-au nemulțumit au avut posibilitatea să solicite să-și vizualizeze lucrările. Într-un centru din Slatina, un candidat din cinci a depus o as…
en: Avalanche of applications after the grades at the National Assessment. One in five candidates asked to see their work. National Assessment candidates who were dissatisfied with the marks posted on Tuesday, June 30, a day earlier than scheduled, had the opportunity to request to view their papers. In a center in Slatina, one candidate out of five submitted an ace...
la: Avalanche applicationes post gradus in aestimatione Nationali. Unus in quinque candidatis quaesivit ut opus suum viderent. National Assessment candidates who were dissatisfied with the marks posted on Tuesday, June 30, a day earlier than scheduled, had the opportunity to request to view their papers. In medio in Slatina unus candidatus ex quinque acc... submisit.
